conversationMetadata.title: Python NameError: PROJECT_ROOT not defined - Claude

messages.content: (venv) venvnathalie@Nathalies-MacBook-Pro LNS4 % python /Users/nathalie/Dropbox/PROJETS/LANOSTRAI/LNS4/app/test_scan_and_register.py Traceback (most recent call last): File "/Users/nathalie/Dropbox/PROJETS/LANOSTRAI/_LNS4/app/test_scan_and_register.py", line 5, in <module> preload_builtins() ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^ File "/Users/nathalie/Dropbox/PROJETS/LANOSTRAI/_LNS4/preload.py", line 7, in preload_builtins init_builtins() ~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^ File "/Users/nathalie/Dropbox/PROJETS/LANOSTRAI/_LNS4/models/Organismus_Regulans/Truncus_Fundamentalis/actions/init_builtins.py", line 46, in init_builtins safe_set_builtin("conn", get_database_connection()) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^ File "/Users/nathalie/Dropbox/PROJETS/LANOSTRAI/_LNS4/models/Cognition/Memoria_Reflexa/actions/get_database_connection.py", line 16, in get_database_connection db_path = get_database_path() File "/Users/nathalie/Dropbox/PROJETS/LANOSTRAI/_LNS4/models/Cognition/Memoria_Reflexa/actions/get_database_path.py", line 5, in get_database_path PROJECT_ROOT, ^^^^^^^^^^^^ NameError: name 'PROJECT_ROOT' is not defined (venv) venvnathalie@Nathalies-MacBook-Pro _LNS4 %
